Avatar of Annihilation

It was time for <%me> and
company to make their move. They would stop
Adam before he could realize his worldwide
revolution. This they knew as they headed for the
innermost depths of Earth Guide's headquarters,
where the First Man waited, in a place where
phantasms gathered.
---------------------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

It was time for the group to move. They would stop Adam
before he could realize his revolution. This headed for the
depths of Earth Guide’s headquarters, where the First Man
waited, in a place where Phantasms gathered.
世界再編を阻止せよ！
